records.ety: [AS. wudubind black ivy; -- so named as binding about trees. See Wood, and Bind, v. t.]

defs: A climbing plant having flowers of great fragrance (Lonicera Periclymenum); the honeysuckle.
The Virginia creeper. See Virginia creeper, under Virginia.
quotes: Beatrice, who even now Is couched in the woodbine coverture.
